| heading1 = [[Mythology|Mythic text]]s | content1 = * ''[[Fudoki]]'' * ''[[Kogo Shūi]]'' * ''[[Kojiki]]'' * ''[[:en:Konjaku Monogatarishū|Konjaku Monogatarishū]]'' * ''[[Kujiki]]'' * ''[[Nihon Ryōiki]]'' * ''[[Nihon Shoki]]'' | heading2 = [[:en:List of Japanese deities|Divinities]] | content2 = * ''[[Amaterasu]]'' * ''[[Ame-no-Uzume]]'' * ''[[:en:Inari Ōkami|Inari]] '' * ''[[Izanagi]]'' * ''[[:en:Izanami|Izanami]]'' * ''[[Kami]]'' * ''[[Myōjin]]'' * [[Seven Lucky Gods]] * ''[[Susanoo-no-Mikoto|Susanoo]]'' * ''[[Tsukuyomi-no-Mikoto|Tsukuyomi]]'' | heading4 = [[:en:List of legendary creatures from Japan|Legendary creatures]] and [[:en:Japanese urban legend|urban legend]]s | content4 = * ''[[:en:Kitsune|Kitsune]]'' * ''[[Oni]]'' * ''[[Onryō]]'' * ''[[Tengu]]'' * ''[[Yōkai]]'' * ''[[Yūrei]]'' | heading5 = Mythical and sacred locations | content5 = * [[:en:Izumo Province|Izumo]] * [[:en:Di Yu|Jigoku]] * [[:en:Mount Fuji|Mount Fuji]] * [[Mount Hiei]] * [[Ryūgū-jō]] * [[Takamagahara]] * [[Yomi]] | heading6 = [[:en:List of sacred objects in Japanese mythology|Sacred objects]] | content6 = * ''[[Ame-no-Nuboko]]'' * ''[[Kusanagi no Tsurugi|Kusanagi]]'' * ''[[Tonbokiri]]'' * [[:en:Imperial Regalia of Japan|Three Sacred Treasures]] | heading7 = [[Shinto|Shintō]] and [[:en:Buddhism in Japan|Buddhism]] | content7 = * [[:en:Obon|Obon]] * ''[[:en:Ema (Shinto)|Ema]]'' * ''[[Setsubun]]'' * ''[[Torii]]'' * [[:en:Buddhist temples in Japan|Buddhist temples]] * [[Shinto shrine]]s }} [[Category:Japan sidebar templates|Mythology and folklore]] [[Category:Mythology sidebar templates|Japanese mythology and folklore]]
